title: ED Attaches Anil Ambani’s Mumbai Flat, Son’s Khandala Farmhouse in ₹3,034-Cr Order
description: Reliance Communications (RCOM) is a company of the Reliance Anil Ambani Group (RAAG). According to a RAAG spokesperson, some of the attached properties belong to Kokilaben D. Ambani, Anil Ambani's mother.
